title: ESC Recommended Exercise of the Week #28
excerpt: We know you’ve always wanted to know what and how to do a Turkish Get-Up. Now’s your opportunity to master this skill. Try using light free weights in place of a kettle bell to get yourself started on this exercise.
content: We know you’ve always wanted to know what and how to do a Turkish Get-Up. Now’s your opportunity to master this skill. Try using light free weights in place of a kettle bell to get yourself started on this exercise.
